name: Card Stack
description: An animated stack of cards that automatically cycles through content with smooth transitions, showing one card at a time with a stack visual behind it.
whenToUse: Use for testimonials, quotes, feature highlights, or any rotating content where you want a stacked card animation.

props.name: items
props.type: { id: number; name: string; designation: string; content: React.ReactNode }[]
props.description: Array of card items to display in the stack

props.name: offset
props.description: Vertical offset between stacked cards in pixels

props.name: scaleFactor
props.description: Scale reduction factor for each subsequent card
